title: 💡 Hiring: Cybersecurity / AI / Blockchain Intern - National Informatics Centre (NIC), MeitY

description_full:
📍 On-site - NIC Centres across India | 🕐 Posted 6 hours ago - April 26, 2026 | 💰 Government Stipend | 🧑‍💻 Summer Internship (2 months)

The National Informatics Centre under Digital India Programme is offering Summer Internship 2026 for students in tech fields. This government internship provides hands-on experience on real national-level systems.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Working on live projects in chosen domain
- Contributing to national digital infrastructure initiatives

🔑 Requirements:
- Current UG / PG students in tech & related fields
- Strong interest in emerging technologies

Domains available:
- Cyber Security
- AI / ML
- Data Analytics
- Cloud & Microservices
- Blockchain, AR/VR, Mobile Computing

📅 Important Dates:
- Start: June 1, 2026
- Duration: June–July 2026 (2 months)
- Application deadline: April 27, 2026

📩 To apply: Visit https://dii.nic.in and complete registration before April 27, 2026. Limited seats.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/vishnu-vardhan-reddy-dumpa_cybersecurity-ai-blockchain-share-7454011928705777664-6h2O
